description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image. Define a single job named deploy that runs in the default stage, is limited to the master branch, and executes the exact shell commands: cp ci_settings.xml /root/.m2/settings.xml and mvn deploy. No services, caches, or artifacts are defined, and the job simply performs a Maven deployment to the configured repository.
